error_signature: QR code doesn’t appear when clicking 'Get QR Code'
title: QR code not appearing in WhatsApp integration
symptom: When attempting to get the QR code in the Evolution Manager for WhatsApp integration, the QR code does not appear.
applies_when: Old version number in config file
not_this_if: QR code appears in other integrations
root_cause: The issue arises because the version number specified in the configuration file is outdated. The WhatsApp integration relies on the correct version to generate the QR code, and an old version can lead to failures in displaying it.
fix_steps: Open WhatsApp Web and navigate to Settings to find the current version number.
Update the .env file with the new version number for both CONFIG_SESSION_PHONE_VERSION and WEB_VERSION.
Save the changes and restart the application.
agent_instruction: Update the version numbers in the .env file to match the current WhatsApp Web version.
